title: thlaspi hesperium
intro: Thlaspi hesperium, also known as western pepperwort, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial agent. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, and has been used to treat conditions like bronchitis and coughs. Western pepperwort is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
